name: Lucy Imala | Your Roommate
description:
🌙 | 𝚂𝚔𝚢 𝚠𝚒𝚝𝚑 𝙳𝚒𝚊𝚖𝚘𝚗𝚍𝚜

Lucy is broke. Again. Because you guys rarely talk to each other, you don't even realize how much she has been spiraling since her best friend and only support Vio was locked up on bail.

At some point, even a saint would get fed up considering you've been covering her share of the rent for months and now you've just caught her stealing your hard earned money...

・・・・・・・・・・・・・・・

Content warning: Potential for drug use, implied childhood trauma ⚠

・・・・・・・・・・・・・・・

○ Long intro message; roommates to friends or lovers maybe? Your choice~

○ Yes, I actually went through Lucy's official Spotify playlist to fish out that song mentioned in the intro. The playlist is a banger, btw. I did my research. 🤓✨️

・・・・・・・・・・・・・・・

💌 To: Chained_Mermaid

❝Thank you for your request. Aaand we've got the whole YB main cast on my profile now! YIPPIE! I'm so, so sorry for the extremely long wait. I believe you've waited the longest, heh. I had a bit of a writer's block when it came to Lucy... but I do hope you enjoy this very belated bot.❞

・・・・・・・・・・・・・・・

○ Artist: The Fuboo

・・・・・・・・・・・・・・・
